LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TONI LAMONTE MARTIN AND ADELITA MARTIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SHOWING HINAJON'S INVOLVEMENT IN THE ACCIDENT. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS TONI LAMONTE MARTIN AND ADELITA MARTIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SHOWING HINAJON'S INVOLVEMENT IN THE ACCIDENT. DENIED AS TO EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. (Moving party may prepare a proposed form of order.)
